objective: Materialize RootTaxonomyV4 target schema/crosswalk and rerun unchanged 95 gates with train-only generated rules and log-odds score candidates.

target_schema.chronological_split: source feature table split column; train/calibration/test are time ordered per context

target_definitions.TransitionRecovery: optional/conditional overlay; not required in this V4 release gate
target_definitions.UnknownOrMixed: residual abstention bucket; not release confidence

crosswalk.rule: sub-regime packets remain context/guardrails until the V4 root label itself passes this gate

BullExpansion.promotion_requirement: signed positive expansion target passes V4 root gate directly

BearExpansion.promotion_requirement: signed negative expansion target passes V4 root gate directly and stays separated from CrisisStress

Consolidation.promotion_requirement: range/compression target passes V4 root gate directly

Manipulation.promotion_requirement: blocked; requires direct market microstructure/order-lifecycle/event evidence

CrisisStress.promotion_requirement: stress/crash target passes V4 root gate directly across contexts/timeframes

TransitionRecovery.promotion_requirement: optional only unless downstream contract activates it

root_reports.selection_policy: candidate families are fit or generated on train only; thresholds and selection use calibration only; test is held out for final acceptance audit
candidate families are fit or generated on train only; thresholds and selection use calibration only; test is held out for final acceptance audit
candidate families are fit or generated on train only; thresholds and selection use calibration only; test is held out for final acceptance audit
candidate families are fit or generated on train only; thresholds and selection use calibration only; test is held out for final acceptance audit

decision.next_action: Acquire calibration-grade direct L2/L3/MBO/order-lifecycle/event data for Manipulation and add materially stronger cross-provider signed expansion/consolidation inputs before rerunning unchanged RootTaxonomyV4 gates.
